role: Thin clap CLI binary named `loop` that parses .looprc config and delegates to loop_lib to run a shell command in parallel across multiple child directories. It is the standalone fan-out execution engine underlying the meta CLI.
northstar: Meta makes multi-repo feel like monorepo without the downsides; the canon machinery stays green, versioned by the parent distribution.
next_command: Plan in kb first (git kb board); mint execution cards via hf (ADR-0003)
